recommendations.title: Jab We Met
recommendations.overview: A depressed wealthy businessman and a spunky carefree young woman embark on an unexpected journey that changes their lives.

recommendations.title: Love Aaj Kal
recommendations.overview: Two lovers break up after they realize that their career goals are pulling them in different directions.

recommendations.title: Tamasha
recommendations.overview: Meeting while on vacation, Ved and Tara sense a connection but vow to keep their real identities a secret. Years later, their paths cross again.

recommendations.title: Highway
recommendations.overview: Right before her wedding, a young woman finds herself abducted and held for ransom. As the initial days pass, she begins to develop a strange bond with her kidnapper.

recommendations.title: Jab Harry Met Sejal
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tour guide develops profound affection for a bubbly traveller while helping her search for a lost engagement ring across various picturesque European destinations.

recommendations.title: The Chorus
recommendations.overview: In 1940s France, a new teacher at a school for disruptive boys gives hope and inspiration.

recommendations.title: Clouds
recommendations.overview: Young musician Zach Sobiech discovers his cancer has spread, leaving him just a few months to live. With limited time, he follows his dream and makes an album, unaware that it will soon be a viral music phenomenon.

recommendations.title: Pitch Perfect
recommendations.overview: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have

recommendations.title: August Rush
recommendations.overview: Lyla and Louis, a singer and a musician, fall in love, but are soon compelled to separate. Lyla is forced to give up her newborn but unknown to her, he grows up to become a musical genius.

recommendations.title: Crossroads
recommendations.overview: A wanna-be blues guitar virtuoso seeks a long-lost song by legendary musician, Robert Johnson.
